title: Statute law of other states
doc_html:
§424.  Statute law of other states

The published statutes and digests of the other states and territories shall be prima facie evidence of the statute laws of the state or territory from which they purport to emanate, without being filed in evidence.
doc_text:
§424.  Statute law of other states
The published statutes and digests of the other states and territories shall be prima facie evidence of the statute laws of the state or territory from which they purport to emanate, without being filed in evidence.
